title: landolphia petersiana var. schweinfurthiana
intro: Landolphia petersiana var. schweinfurthiana, also known as the African bitter yam or the bitter manioc, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Landolphia petersiana var. schweinfurthiana are made by boiling the roots or leaves to create a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
